TestCase z19Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: set a random finite element to INF
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    double inf = 1.0/0.0;
    double ninf = -1.0/0.0;
    double val = follow_case.elements[idx];
    if (val == val && val != inf && val != ninf) {
        follow_case.elements[idx] = inf;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
